title: Humbled to announce I’ve joined Topline Pro as VP of Sales.
excerpt: Humbled to announce I’ve joined Topline Pro as VP of Sales. The first thing I saw when I walked into the office was a sign on the wall that said: “No Bullsh*t.” I remember thinking in that moment, “I’m home.”

title: I’m humbled to announce that over the last two months, I have been a mess.
excerpt: I’m humbled to announce that over the last two months, I have been a mess. No new role or fellowship. Not even a certification. I remained quietly, professionally functional, but a mess nonetheless.

title: Stop scrolling, start creating.
excerpt: Stop scrolling. Start creating. Every minute you spend consuming could be a minute spent building. Your first 100 posts will suck. Your first product will flop. Your first launch will disappoint. And that's exactly why you need to start today.

title: I don’t usually post about personal stuff on LinkedIn. But this matters.
excerpt: I don’t usually post about personal stuff on LinkedIn. But this matters. A close friend of ours has recently been diagnosed with breast cancer. My wife has decided to do a squat challenge to raise funds for the National Breast Cancer Foundation.

title: If you’ve been laid off recently, I have tough but tender messages for you.
excerpt: If you’ve been laid off recently, I have tough but tender messages for you: Don’t hang out with your ex-coworkers. And stop gossiping about your old company. Post-layoff community can sometimes turn into a trap.

title: Sharing this in case it helps other agencies, publishers, or accounts teams.
excerpt: Sharing this in case it helps other agencies, publishers, or accounts teams. We were copied on an email chasing payment for link placements that we did not order. It included real billing details and looked legitimate at first glance.
